title: Island Adventure
description: Start your new adventure in a world made up of floating islands, quests, and many more secrets to discover!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IslandAdventure/MP_IslandAdventure_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/island-adventure) version.** ## Island Adventure is a unique survival modpack set in a world of floating islands above an endless ocean. To thrive, you’ll need to adapt to challenging environments, explore mysterious structures suspended in the air, face new enemies, and discover surprising creatures living among the clouds. But the adventure doesn’t end in the skies: with advanced technology and innovative vehicles, you’ll be able to fly freely and even venture beyond, traveling to distant planets. You’ll also have a complete quest system to guide you through some of the most important and complex mods, such as Ad Astra and The Aether. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IslandAdventure/MP_IslandAdventure_description.webp) Explore new islands that can be generated infinitely in your world, all of them floating above the ocean. In addition, quests and a bunch of mods have been added to make your gaming experience as fun as possible. 🏝️ Survive on floating islands with mods like Ember’s Floating Islands, Sky Villages, Sky Structures and Castle in the Sky, plus new biomes from Biomes O’ Plenty. 🔊 Enjoy an immersive atmosphere with AmbientSounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Serene Seasons or Better Animations Collection and more. ⚔️ Face new enemies and explore epic structures thanks to YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Awesome Dungeon (Nether, End, Ocean), Dungeon Crawl, Medieval Buildings, and mobs from Mowzie’s Mobs or Mutant Monsters. 🍎 Expand survival with Farmer’s Delight, Mystical Agriculture, Better Archeology, Aquaculture 2, plus wildlife from Alex’s Mobs and Exotic Birds. 🚀 Travel beyond the skies with Ad Astra and addons, explore dimensions with The Aether, Deep Aether and Aether Redux, and build tech with Applied Energistics 2, Powah!, Immersive Aircraft, Iron Jetpacks and Valkyrien Skies. 🧑🏻‍🤝‍🧑🏼 Optimized for multiplayer with Embeddium, Oculus, and compatible with Complementary Shaders - Unbound. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IslandAdventure/MP_IslandAdventure_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 5GB or 5120 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/IslandAdventure/MP_IslandAdventure_screenshot.webp) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JTWJ6IS6/images/1e95420c204911781f0a554fa52e781f8cce3350.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JTWJ6IS6/images/6932fa69eb5c467e81ef0df2de14de01e820485f.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JTWJ6IS6/images/c85efbec7e21ea071293e1cfcb8b7a903a46f19b.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
